The '''''Gamemaster Toolkit: Live-Action Adventures''''' is a gamebook and follow-up to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Live-Action Adventures]] rulebook. It provided a detailed description of [[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]].

{{Game-stub}}
